List Operations
code:
# Basic list operations
numbers = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]
print('Original:', numbers)
print('Sum:', sum(numbers))
print('Average:', sum(numbers) / len(numbers))

title: File I/O
code:
# Reading and writing files
with open('example.txt', 'w') as f:
    f.write('Hello, File!')

with open('example.txt', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
    print(content)
